title: Wilds Regrown Vanilla+
description: A vanilla friendly implementation of the WRG world generator.
body:
![cozy fun minecraft terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E2GqTreT/images/4bc4b5f97cb212890731f0e5216087c089c08352.jpeg)
# Wilds Regrown Vanilla+

Vanilla+ is a side-project from [WildsRegrown](https://modrinth.com/mod/wildsregrown). A vanilla biome pack for the generator. Works great with the [WildNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/wildnature-redux) biome pack!

### Realistic terrain
Realistic landscapes featuring various erosion filters, along with a simplified [Koppen climate](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/K%C3%B6ppen_climate_classification) system for biomes, providing an excellent background for your next build.
### Custom sub-biome layer
Biomes can spawn in different variations with a new biome feature layer.
### Rivers
Rivers start in the mountain ranges and find their way down to the coast, they also push your boat downstream.
### Structure features
Illagers and villagers sometimes hide behind walls!

![realistic minecraft terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E2GqTreT/images/c04483d152a00cb58017988ff95bacd9b2994725.jpeg)

## Configurable options
Choose from multiple world types and a wide variety of configurable settings.
![climate config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E2GqTreT/images/c4b2592576952bd40ef1072ca7cb9d8128253384.jpeg)

## How too play

Use the "world painter" button in the main menu to create a WRG world.
To locate features and biomes more quickly, use the "/wrg" command.

**Requires** [WildsRegrown API](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilds-regrown-api)

## Alpha stage
Not everything works perfectly, (yet). Please report any bugs found in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Kr6veDaJDr) server.

## Community feedback
Help improving Vanilla+! Got some cool ideas for biome variations or terrains?
Share it on [Discord](https://discord.gg/Kr6veDaJDr)!

### Notes
 - Incompatible with other world gen mods.
 - Incompatible with other biome mods.
 - Disable Distant horizons chunk generation, this slows down the generator alot!
